title: Booja - Booja, Almond Salted Caramel Vegan Chocolate Truffles 92g
features: 8 Multi-Award-Winning Almond Salted Caramel Truffles: Luxuriously smooth, melt-in-the-mouth chocolate truffles filled with chewy, gooey sea salted caramel and roasted almond swoons. Crafted for moments of pure indulgence.

Perfect for Gifting, Sharing, or Treating Yourself: Whether it’s an intimate celebration, a thoughtful thank-you, or a quiet indulgent moment, this perfectly sized box brings a touch of Booja-Booja to any occasion.
Certified Organic & Free-From friendly: Free from dairy, gluten, and soya. Made with minimal, high-quality ingredients. Perfect for those who seek exquisite chocolate without compromise.
Vegan & Palm Oil-Free: Elegantly simple and consciously crafted to be enjoyed by all. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians, and coeliacs. No palm oil or artificial additives.
Made in Norfolk, England: Craft and packed with care at our Booja-Booja HQ to ensure exceptional quality and flavour in every pack.
description: Product Description Discover the joys of vegan chocolate Delicious multi award-winning* chocolate truffles and truffle loglets: handmade with the finest organic ingredients to create moments of melt-in-the-mouth delight. *We're certified by The Vegan Society and The Soil Association. So far this year we've won 5 awards for our chocolate truffles, from The Great Taste Awards 2023, Free From Food Awards 2023 and Nourish Vegan Awards 2023. In total, we've won 174 awards (and counting) across our product range. A little more about us... Booja - Booja offers you delicious moments of beautifully sweet pleasure that help brighten the faces of friends and loved ones... and to occasionally quietly enjoy on your own. Using the minimal number of simple organic ingredients, we've been making delightful chocolate truffles in Norfolk since 1999. With many awards* for taste and quality, it's easy to see why we have quickly developed an enthusiastic following. All of our delicious products are dairy, gluten and soya free. They're also palm oil-free. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians and coeliacs. Eight Truffle Gifting Range 92g Scrumptious truffles featured in this collection... Hazelnut Crunch Melt in the mouth sweetly roasted hazelnut delights, coated in cocoa powder. Almond Salted Caramel Melt in the mouth, gooey sea salted caramel and roasted almonds swoons, coated in cocoa powder. Honeycomb Caramel A full scrunch of our special caramel honeycomb, coated in cocoa powder. Chocolate Orange Juicy little bursts of tangy mandarin surprises, coated in cocoa powder. Deeply Chocolate Pure, smooth, close your eyes, melt in the mouth chocolatiness, coated in cocoa powder. Chocolate Salted Caramel Seas of salted chocolate caramel chewiness, coated in cocoa powder. Around Midnight Espresso Flying with the full flavour of deeply roasted Mexican beans, coated in cocoa powder. Fine de Champagne Charmingly befuddled with organic Fine de Champagne, coated in cocoa powder.
